label: General Assessment Rules
content:
• Read each question carefully before answering.
  • Use the provided time effectively and avoid leaving questions unanswered.
  • Review your answers before final submission.

label: Proctored Compliance Rules
content:
• Keep camera enabled throughout the attempt.
  • Switching browser tabs may trigger warnings.
  • Any misconduct can lead to exam cancellation.

label: Coding Round Guidelines
content:
• Explain assumptions in concise comments.
  • Write clear and testable logic.
  • Prefer readability over unnecessary optimization.
